Browse Topics Search

Hitching a free ride

Jo Craven NICAR staff December 1995
Business & Economy

An examination of nonprofit organizations in the U.S. reveals significant tax advantages and financial power while they compete with for-profit enterprises. Reporters explore how nonprofits manage 1.475 trillion in assets while maintaining tax-exempt status.

Can you say nonprofit, kids? The National Football League can. So can the Professional Golf Association... The U.S. Treasury is impossible to calculate, the magazine concluded.
